# Sample Asset Pack — generated by `tools/dgd_assets.py`

These were produced in-agent, offline, for $0, in the gold + deep-navy editorial brand
style. They demonstrate the new Stage-5 capability: the DGD Video Studio agent can now
*make* visuals, not just hand you prompts.

| File | Command |
|---|---|
| `01_title.png` | `title --headline "Why your money quietly loses value" --kicker "Sound Money - Ep. 1" --subtitle "…"` |
| `02_thumb.png` | `thumb --headline "The 1% rule nobody explains" --kicker "Digital Gold"` |
| `03_disclosure.png` | `disclosure` (reusable SPONSORED · NOT FINANCIAL ADVICE overlay) |
| `04_lower_third.png` | `lower --text "Not financial advice - Educational"` |
| `05_motif_network.png` | `motif --theme network` (decentralization) |
| `06_motif_scarcity.png` | `motif --theme scarcity` (fixed-supply grid + coin) |
| `07_motif_erosion.png` | `motif --theme erosion` (debasement, illustrative) |
| `08_motif_supply.png` | `motif --theme supply-chain` (circulation) |
| `09_motif_history.png` | `motif --theme monetary-history` (classical temple) |
| `10_motif_vault.png` | `motif --theme vault` (vault door, golden light) |

Render this whole set in one shot with `python3 tools/dgd_assets.py kit --headline "…" --outdir raw/ep1`.

All text passes a fail-closed compliance pre-scan before rendering. See
`skills/dgd-video-studio/reference/asset-generation.md`.
